# Newcastle Pet Cremation Services

> Calm, compassionate pet cremation in Newcastle upon Tyne and the North East. Individual and communal cremation for dogs, cats, and small pets. Collection from your home or vet across Newcastle, Gateshead, North Tyneside, South Tyneside, and Northumberland.

## Services

- [Individual Pet Cremation](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/services.html): Your companion cremated alone in a dedicated chamber. Ashes returned to you in a hand-finished wooden casket with a certificate of individual cremation.
- [Communal Pet Cremation](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/services.html#communal): A dignified shared cremation. Ashes scattered in a memorial garden you are welcome to visit. Lower cost option.
- [The Process](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/process.html): Step by step, from completing the form to your companion coming home. Same-day collection in almost all cases.
- [Pricing](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/pricing.html): Transparent pricing for individual and communal cremation, including memorial products.

## Questions Answered

- [Pet Cremation Questions Answered](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/pet-cremation-questions.html): Direct answers to common questions about cost, individual vs communal, how to verify you're getting your pet's ashes back, collection, and what to expect.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/faq.html): General FAQ about pet cremation in Newcastle.

## Memorials and Grief Support

- [Memorial Products](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/memorials.html): Paw-print keepsakes, engraved plaques, memorial jewellery, and caskets.
- [Coping with Pet Loss](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/grief-support.html): Gentle guidance and support resources for families in Newcastle and the North East.

## Areas Served

- [Newcastle](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/newcastle.html)
- [Gateshead](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/gateshead.html)
- [North Tyneside](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/north-tyneside.html)
- [South Tyneside](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/south-tyneside.html)
- [Northumberland](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/northumberland.html)

## About

- [Our Story](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/about.html): How Newcastle Pet Cremation Services came to be, and what we believe families deserve.
- [Contact](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/contact.html): Complete the form to begin. A trusted local crematorium will call you back, usually within 30 minutes.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/privacy.html)

## Key Facts

- Based in Newcastle upon Tyne, serving the North East of England
- Works only with APCC-compliant crematoriums (Association of Private Crematoria and Cemeteries)
- Strict traceability protocol: every pet has a unique identification disc from collection through ash return
- Same-day collection arranged in almost all cases
- Ashes typically returned within seven days, hand-delivered or collection arranged with you
- No hard sell, no pressure — quote based on your situation, not a fixed fee sheet
